settings.title: Keyboard Shortcuts
settings.description: Customize keyboard shortcuts for this device and account.

errors.saveFailed: Failed to save keyboard shortcut preferences
errors.printFailed: Unable to open print window. Allow pop-ups and try again.

resetAll.title: Reset all shortcuts?
resetAll.message: All custom keyboard shortcuts will be removed.

advisory.hostileCombo: {{binding}} may conflict with browser or operating system shortcuts for {{action}}.

commandPalette.title: Command Palette
commandPalette.fulltextHint: Type at least 2 characters to search records.
commandPalette.fulltextInlineHelp: Searching across records, comments, and documents.

syntax.title: Search tips
syntax.summary: Type a menu name or action; use /nav or >action to narrow.
syntax.inlineHelp: Use /nav for navigation or >action for actions.

toggleChat.label: Toggle AI chat
toggleChat.description: Open the AI assistant or focus the current chat.

quickAsk.label: Quick ask AI
quickAsk.description: Start a quick AI assistant prompt.

create.label: Create on page
create.description: Create a new item on the current page.

previous.label: Previous item
previous.description: Move selection to the previous item.

next.label: Next item
next.description: Move selection to the next item.

backToParent.label: Back to parent list
backToParent.description: Activate the page back navigation button when one is available.

cancel.label: Cancel dialog
cancel.description: Close or cancel the active dialog.

close.label: Close panel
close.description: Close the active panel or drawer.

addTime.label: Add time entry
addTime.description: Open the time entry drawer for the current record.

moveUp.label: Move up
moveUp.description: Move the selected editor item up.

moveDown.label: Move down
moveDown.description: Move the selected editor item down.

moveLeft.label: Move left
moveLeft.description: Move the selected editor item left.

moveRight.label: Move right
moveRight.description: Move the selected editor item right.

halfDown.label: Scroll half page down
halfDown.description: Scroll down by half a page.

halfUp.label: Scroll half page up
halfUp.description: Scroll up by half a page.

fullDown.label: Scroll full page down
fullDown.description: Scroll down by one full page.

fullUp.label: Scroll full page up
fullUp.description: Scroll up by one full page.

top.label: Scroll to top
top.description: Scroll to the top of the current page or panel.

bottom.label: Scroll to bottom
bottom.description: Scroll to the bottom of the current page or panel.

primarySearch.label: Focus page search
primarySearch.description: Focus the primary search field on the current page.

nextRow.label: Next table row
nextRow.description: Move the active row marker to the next selectable table row.

previousRow.label: Previous table row
previousRow.description: Move the active row marker to the previous selectable table row.

toggleRow.label: Toggle table row
toggleRow.description: Select or deselect the active table row.

visualRange.label: Visual row range
visualRange.description: Start or stop selecting a contiguous table row range.

lastAction.label: Repeat last action
lastAction.description: Repeat the last Vim-style navigation action.

record.label: Record macro
record.description: Start or stop recording a Vim-style navigation macro.

play.label: Play macro
play.description: Play a recorded Vim-style navigation macro.

show.label: Show link hints
show.description: Show keyboard hints for visible links and controls.

showNewTab.label: Show link hints in new tab
showNewTab.description: Show keyboard hints and open links in a new tab when possible.
